feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Hey never thought it would happen, but I almost got into an altercation on the s…
entry.content: Hey never thought it would happen, but I almost got into an altercation on the street today. At first the individual pretended to be interested sexually, so I gave him a chance then all of a sudden he started acting really strange, we were out in public but I didn't care. He seemed like he was under the influence of some type of drugs. He started being really forceful and aggressive and of course I was just turned on at first, even after he started slapping me. But then he pulled out a fleshligh
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /b/ Random: The Abortion Bans are working
entry.content: Leftards don't want to admit it, but states which have restricted abortions are seeing an increase in their birthrates. This combined with ICE's mass deportation of migrants is going to save Americans from extinction.
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /int/ International: I used to stay up until 2 or 3 am, but now I go to bed between 9 and 11 pm and s…
entry.content: I used to stay up until 2 or 3 am, but now I go to bed between 9 and 11 pm and sleep until 10 in the morning. I sleep as much as possible because it's the only time I don't have to think about my problems. The moment I'm awake, they're all I can think about
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: feeling cold and defeated with a lot of time to think about what I've done that …
entry.content: feeling cold and defeated with a lot of time to think about what I've done that caused me to get expelled..... I've just been laying in my bed with my knife. I love the thing, but I understand now why switchblades are preferred if you don't seriously want to maim or harm someone. But I love my big hunting knife. How am I supposed to move to America now? I failed the military, now I failed school, Austria is just a dead end from here out.
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /b/ Random: Coke
entry.content: Anyone here who used to do drugs, quit, and lives a healthy life? How did you do it? I've tried many drugs and now (past 2-3 years) i only do coke every few months. In my 30s. Even if its occasional, im psychologically addicted to it. I only do it at home, alone. Im not in the US, no fentanyl here, but it still takes only one unlucky time to get a heart attack. Ive tried rehab, ive tried narcotics anonymous, but i keep coming back to it simply because i love it. Be nice motherfuckers.
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: An Indian company called Pocket FM now sells tens of thousands of AI-animated, A…
entry.content: An Indian company called Pocket FM now sells tens of thousands of AI-animated, AI-written, AI-voiced audiobooks. The Pocket FM app has 4 million reviews and 100 million downloads on the Google App store. Why do I bring this up? Because the main hurdle to writers and artists successfully suing AI companies was that AI-generated text was not competing with them, and therefore not a threat to their income. This is clearly no longer the case. Artists and writers now have unambiguous evidence that AI
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /news/ News: Trump Media pitched $100,000 monthly fee for fastest feed of U.S. president’s posts, sources say
entry.content: https://www.cnbc.com/2026/07/18/tru mp-media-pitched-100000/month-fee-f or-fastest-feed-of-trump-posts.html Donald Trump’s social media company has discussed charging Wall Street traders and investment firms as much as $100,000 a month for faster access to the U.S. president’s posts on his Truth Social platform, according to people familiar with the matter. Trump Media & Technology Group, which owns Truth Social, has in recent weeks also pitched a discounted plan of $60,000 per month if the firm
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /news/ News: Father and son arrested after holding 2 Forest Service workers at gunpoint
entry.content: https://apnews.com/article/forest-s ervice-workers-kidnapped-california -fd63ca6262e817b237eb85fb5412c7af REDDING, Calif. (AP) — A father and son are expected to face federal kidnapping charges after they zip-tied two U.S. Forest Service employees and held them at gunpoint inside a trailer in Northern California near Mt. Shasta. Forest Service Chief Tom Schultz said the two workers were conducting routine field operations in the Shasta-Trinity National Forest when they were taken Thursday. They
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /news/ News: Mike Lindell, Trump’s pick for governor, isn’t registered to vote in Minnesota
entry.content: https://www.startribune.com/mike-li ndell-trumps-pick-for-governor-isnt -registered-to-vote-in-minnesota/60 1868792 Before he can vote for himself in next month’s primary, Mike Lindell needs to register to vote in the state he wants to lead as governor. The Minnesota Secretary of State’s office said Lindell, President Donald Trump’s preferred candidate, “does not have an active record,” said Cassondra Knudson, spokesperson for the Minnesota Secretary of State, when asked if Lindell is a register
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /news/ News: Doctors question evidence behind Pentagon plan for testosterone screening
entry.content: https://www.theguardian.com/us-news /2026/jul/18/us-military-testostero ne-screening-doctors The US defense secretary, Pete Hegseth, this week ordered an annual testosterone-deficiency screening for active-duty and reserve service members aged 30 and older, which he says will help to maintain military readiness. But many medical professionals warn it might do nothing of the sort and instead could increase service members’ risk of infertility or lead to other consequences if testosterone is presc
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Odyssey Thread
entry.content: I’ve seen The Odyssey and I would like to have an actual discussion. Here are my scattered thoughts. First off, all the backlash about Nolan possibly making the film “woke” turned out to be ridiculous - and was ridiculous from the start. We’re talking about the man who made The Dark Knight Rises, one of the most blatantly anti-leftist blockbusters ever made. The Odyssey is not woke in the slightest. All of the “questionable” casting choices (bar one) have laughably minimal screentime in this nea
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >The odyssey is a zoomer movie It’s joever bros
entry.content: >The odyssey is a zoomer movie It’s joever bros
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: It was early in Always Sunny's history, on a Talk Show. The host was like "Oh yo…
entry.content: It was early in Always Sunny's history, on a Talk Show. The host was like "Oh you know that gibberish end card you play at the end of every episode? Well we reversed it to find out what you are saying, and were gonna play it now!" Then they played the audio saying "the jews control hollywood, the jews control hollywood" This isn't what the end card gibberish says in reverse in actuality, but it was a bit for the talk show, and made the audience laugh and the guest smile a bit uncomfortably. Natu
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /news/ News: 2 US soldiers killed, 1 missing after Iranian strikes on Jordanian US Base
entry.content: https://www.reuters.com/world/middl e-east/iran-renews-attacks-gulf-sta tes-after-another-night-us-strikes- 2026-07-18/ WASHINGTON/CAIRO, July 18 (Reuters) - The U.S. military said on Saturday two of its personnel were killed in Jordan and another was missing after an Iranian attack, while Iran's supreme leader said Washington would pay for "seeking to escalate the conflict" after a seventh straight night of U.S. strikes. The U.S. and Iran have intensified attacks since an interim ceasefire deal
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Is anyone seriously falling for this?
entry.content: They distill American models. Copying all the output from the models is not the same thing as making your own model. It's like pirating Hollywood movies and then pretending you can make Hollywood movies. China isn't innovating. It's not in their nature to innovate.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /b/ Random: Demographics is destiny. Having said that, lets take a look around and see who i…
entry.content: Demographics is destiny. Having said that, lets take a look around and see who is procreating above modern replacement values of 2.1 kids per couple. You can screech about MIGA all you want but consider this. We are a country of 350 million people and lets face it, Israel is living a parasitic life right now. Dependent on welfare and handouts from the US to the tune of billions per year. They really dont have as much influence as you were led to believe. And if their success were guaranteed, the
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /mu/ Music: >Kids today don't know the Beatles' Sgt. Pepper. And when those who do see our f…
entry.content: >Kids today don't know the Beatles' Sgt. Pepper. And when those who do see our film and hear us doing it, that will be the version they relate to and remember. Unfortunately, the Beatles will be secondary. You see, there is no such thing as the Beatles. They don't exist as a band and never performed Sgt. Pepper live, in any case. When ours comes out, it will be, in effect, as if theirs never existed. When you heard the Beatles do 'Long Tall Sally' or 'Roll Over Beethoven,' did you care about Lit
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /b/ Random: Reminder that diarrhea lettuce is his fault too
entry.content: Last February, shortly after Trump took office, the US Department of Agriculture (USDA) dissolved its National Advisory Committee on Microbiological Criteria for Foods, which provided scientific guidance on food safety policy. Ryan Cooper at The Prospect notes that the committee was working on advice for foodborne illness outbreaks before being terminated. The FDA also shut down its National Advisory Committee on Meat and Poultry Inspection. https://futurism.com/health-medicin e/explosive-diarrh
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.content: listen and learn

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: BBC made you a faggot. You were never gay, you never had any gay thoughts. You’v…
entry.content: BBC made you a faggot. You were never gay, you never had any gay thoughts. You’ve always loved porn and loved that the guys have bigger dicks than you. But then you discovered BBC interracial porn and something switched. You couldn’t take your eyes off of those huge monster black cocks. After that you only started watching BBC porn, nothing else could turn you on. Without even realizing it, you became more and more focused on the big black monster cocks. They are SO much bigger, so superior to
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /SCAT/
entry.content: Welcome to the Saturday "Scaturday" jamboree! A place where everyone can let loose their filth fetish (EFRO, Smearing, constipation, hyperscat, etc.) anywhere they please! We know that you've been holding in your dirty desires all week, and now its time to drop trou and feel that sweet relief! Feel free to post, discuss, RP or any such activity that churns up your inner scholarly scatologist! Be it named poop, dookie, logs, stink pickles, butt bananas doesn't matter what you call it. Humanoid, a
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /b/ Random: i have the opportunity to go to a medical research facility in the near future, …
entry.content: i have the opportunity to go to a medical research facility in the near future, where i would be staying for up to a year and they would be giving me experimental drugs to see how i would respond to them, they would also be giving me regular meals and a place to sleep...does this sound like a good idea?
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Why is contemporary children's media so bastardised? Plenty of family films from…
entry.content: Why is contemporary children's media so bastardised? Plenty of family films from 40+ years ago weren't afraid to challenge kids. Are we expected to believe that children of today would reject an authentic, non-comedic, non-sloppified retelling of Animal Farm?
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Rhythm Heaven Groove
entry.content: Hey, you. No, not Yu. I meant YOU. That's right, (you) over there. You're going to post the medals you've gotten, the perfects you've obtained, and share your rhythmic flow score. Right now. Are we clear? This is a Rhythm Heaven Groove thread, kiddo. Don't fuck around. You don't want to make us angry. And get in that car. Gotta move those wipers.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: New project [s4s]
entry.content: I'm going to make a sculpture of Yosho. Look at my base, wish me good luck.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Mic use
entry.content: Does anyone use the mic in this game? I bought blops 2 because I skipped the original and I was hoping that people would be yapping in the lobbies like the good old days but I haven't heard a peep so far. Maybe blops 1 has more fun lobbies.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Gather Me [Neighborhood, 1971] Unlike my straightlaced friends, I've always dug …
entry.content: Gather Me [Neighborhood, 1971] Unlike my straightlaced friends, I've always dug the idea of Melanie--Edith Piaf as Brooklyn waif, preaching the hippie gospel in that absurdly flexible and resonant alto. But I've found the reality cloying. Here she grows up just enough. "Brand New Key" is one of those impossible celebrations of teen libido that renew one's faith in AM radio. "Steppin'" is the best breakup song since "It's Too Late," and though side two slips badly toward the end, she's rarely a s
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Android is so shit now Apple is better
entry.content: As a longtime Samsung user, I bought a iPhone 16 a couple weeks ago and replaced it with my Android and this effectively made me stop doomscrolling on the phone completely. iPhone is so painful to use that it feels like I have a brickphone again for nothing but calling and messaging but I'm not really complaining. Though the iPhone feels better to use and has a better camera and battery and everything else is more or less the same as Android. My biggest complaint is that the keyboard is fucking
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >director's best movies are his first movies A tale as old as time.
